case_title: CARLOS STEVE SENSEBE VS. MATTHEW LOREN GROZA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-10-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR, PLAINTIFF CARLOS STEVE SENSEBE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MATTHEW LOREN GORZA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. STARTING JULY 1, 2021, DEFENDANT MATTHEW LOREN GROZA HAS CUSTODY OF THE DOG FOR ALL MONTHS WITH 31 DAYS. PLAINTIFF WILL HAVE CUSTODY OF THE DOG ON MONTHS LESS THAN 31 DAYS. THE DOG MUST BE TRANSFERRED TO THE OTHER PARTY BY MIDNIGHT OF THE LAST DAY OF THE MONTH. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER ON (SC-105A) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS). YOUR MUST GO TO COURT IF YOU WANT TO BE HEARD. A HEARING ON THIS REQUEST IS SCHEDULED. RE: CUSTODY OF DOG
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR (SC-105A) ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS) DEFENDANT GROZA IS ORDERED TO BRING THE DOG TO COURT. HEARING SET FOR NOV-12-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SC-105 - REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER RE: CUSTODY OF DOG FILED BY PLAINTIFF SENSEBE, CARLOS STEVE AS TO DEFENDANT GROZA, MATTHEW LOREN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SENSEBE, CARLOS STEVE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GROZA, MATTHEW LOREN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,040.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-25-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GROZA, MATTHEW LOREN
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SENSEBE, CARLOS STEVE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
REMARK: RECD WHAT MAY BE EXHIBITS/EVIDENCE BY MAIL SUBMITTED BY PLANTIFF(NO REQUEST FOR ZOOM HAS BEEN FILED AS OF 6/3/21)

ORDER RE: DOG CUSTODY. STARTING JULY 1, 2021, DEFENDANT MATTHEW LOREN GROZA HAS CUSTODY OF THE DOG FOR ALL MONTHS WITH 31 DAYS. PLAINTIFF WILL HAVE CUSTODY OF THE DOG ON MONTHS LESS THAN 31 DAYS. THE DOG MUST BE TRANSFERRED TO THE OTHER PARTY BY MIDNIGHT OF THE LAST DAY OF THE MONTH. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-12-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-12-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF CARLOS STEVE SENSEBE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MATTHEW LOREN GROZA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-12-2021 - JUDGMENT.
(SC-105A) ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY MATTHEW LOREN GROZA IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO NOV-12-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $100.00 FILED BY SENSEBE, CARLOS STEVE AS TO DEFENDANT GROZA, MATTHEW LOREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
